---
name: 💡 Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature for PrintWearX
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

A clear and concise description of the problem you're trying to solve. Ex. *I'm always frustrated when [...]*

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Include any UI/UX considerations.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider? Why did you settle on this one?

## Mockups / examples

If applicable, add mockups, sketches, or links to similar features in other products.

## Priority

How important is this to you?

- [ ] Critical — blocking my use of PrintWearX
- [ ] High — would significantly improve my workflow
- [ ] Medium — nice to have
- [ ] Low — minor improvement

## Scope

What area of the app does this affect?

- [ ] Storefront
- [ ] Admin dashboard
- [ ] Auth
- [ ] Cart / checkout
- [ ] Search
- [ ] Mobile
- [ ] Accessibility
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other: ___

## Additional context

Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here.
